global_notes: documents is the central table for ingested budget documents.
states is a shared enum-like table used by documents, extraction_runs, and extraction_results.
resultfeedbacks can be empty and this is normal in current operations.
sections stores structured JSON fragments extracted from source documents.
rulesets version both extraction rules (field_rules) and validation rules (validation_rules).

documents.role: Central table listing each ingested budget document used as extraction input.
query_hints: A document typically has one extraction_run in practice, even if schema allows multiple runs.
mask is a key filter to choose applicable rules.

columns.document_id: Unique document identifier in the platform.
columns.mask: Technical document type (examples: M57_CA, M57_CFU, M4_CA, M4_CFU, M57, M4).
columns.document_year: Budget year attached to the document.
columns.created_at: Creation timestamp of the document record.
columns.link_bucketS3: S3 path/link to the stored document file.
columns.state_id: Current global state of the document.
columns.error_message: Blocking/global error message for ingestion or extraction.

extraction_runs.role: Execution context of extraction for a document (status, config, timestamp).

extraction_results.role: Extracted financial fields per document/run (one row per targeted field).

columns.safir_field_id: Functional identifier of the targeted financial field.
columns.document_id: Source document id (redundant but useful for querying).
columns.value: Extracted value (often numeric, stored as text).
columns.message_error: Extraction error details for this field (JSON text).
columns.message_warning: Extraction warning details for this field (JSON text).

resultfeedbacks.role: Human feedback on extracted results (correction, comment, error type).
query_hints: Do not assume missing feedback means missing extraction; feedback collection can be inactive.

columns.corrected_value: Manual corrected value when extraction is wrong.

states.role: Shared state catalog used as enum-like reference.

columns.code: Business/technical state code (PENDING, PROCESSING, SUCCESS, PARTIAL, ERROR, VALIDATED, REJECTED).

sections.role: Structured sections extracted from documents, stored as JSON text.
query_hints: No direct FK exists between sections and extraction_results even if semantically related.

rulesets.role: Versioned groups of rules shared by extraction and validation logic.

columns.description: Human-readable description of this ruleset version.

field_rules.role: Extraction rules defining how target values are captured from documents.
query_hints: This table defines the extraction target list through safir_field_id.

columns.safir_field_id: Target field identifier extracted from documents.
columns.mask: Document mask/type targeted by the extraction rule.
columns.ruleset_id: Ruleset version for this extraction rule.

validation_rules.role: Business validation rules to check extraction consistency and quality.
query_hints: A single validation rule can apply to multiple safir_field_id via safir_field_id_list.

columns.level_of_problem: Problem severity when rule fails (ALERTE or ECHEC).
columns.mask: Document mask/type targeted by the rule.
columns.ruleset_id: Ruleset version for this validation rule.
columns.message_if_problem: Explicit message emitted when the rule fails.
columns.safir_field_id_list: JSON array of target field ids for the rule.
